contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description1: BZ INFINITY LIMITED and its subsidiary companies form a technology services group, We specialize in artificial intelligence, big data, cloud computing, fintech, and cybersecurity, providing enterprises with digital solutions, intelligent system development, cloud services and infrastructure construction.
contact.description2: Our headquarters is located in Hong Kong Island, with subsidiaries in Shanghai, Shenzhen and other major cities. We are gradually establishing branches in Australia, Europe and other regions to build a global localized service network.

tips.tip1: Add 50% of food budget, whenever you don't order
tips.tip3: Move account balance to short term FD
tips.tip4: Move 20% savings to low-risk to balance risk
tips.tip5: Apply for IPO with 15% plus GMP
tips.tip6: Use 5% of your salary in mutual funds and stocks
